message:
fix: allow /var/home in safe boundary check for Fedora Silverblue

Fedora Silverblue and derivatives (Bluefin, etc.) use /var/home as the
user home directory instead of /home. The isPathInSafeBoundary check
blocked all paths under /var, including these legitimate home dirs.

Adds /var/home/ to the safe prefix allowlist and to the other-user
home directory rejection check.

Co-authored-by: maphew <maphew@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/crew/emma
